failures.description: The agent invoked ProductCatalogSearch with invalid arguments: product_id was changed to 0 and item_id was omitted, so the tool rejected the call with a schema error.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to retrieve the price of item 1345513440 using ProductCatalogSearch with the available item_id and product_id. At index 2, the agent had the required IDs from the Coordinator plan_query, but produced tool_args {"product_id": 0}, omitting required item_id and using an integer instead of the required string product_id. The next step explicitly confirms a SchemaError: the tool requires string product_id and item_id. This is a malformed tool invocation, not a connectivity, access, or unsupported-capability issue.
